text: As I approach this glass-walled space, something about the design and the soft institutional lighting makes me feel both curious and a touch insignificant amid the structured environment. The anticipation of entering a zone dedicated to "R+D" sparks a contemplative feeling—what new ideas or potentials might arise here? There’s an undercurrent of excitement mixed with humility as I stand at the threshold of a room that celebrates human ingenuity and collaboration. I feel open and ready for discovery, even as a quiet unease reminds me of the vastness of what I do not know.
